case_title: BROWN, FRANK et al VS INEZ O. IMGRUND REVOCABLE TRUST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,178.00 FILED BY BROWN, FRANK CARDONA, ALVIN CARDONA, GALINDA AS TO DEFENDANT INEZ O. IMGRUND REVOCABLE TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
